name: PR Review Digest
description: Fetches open PRs across configured repositories and reports review status, CI, and merge conflicts.
tagline: Per-PR review status, CI results, and merge conflicts — sorted oldest-first, stale PRs highlighted.

ownedSettings.label: PR review digest schedule
ownedSettings.description: Cron, model, prompt, and run parameters.

settings.label: PR Review Digest repositories
settings.description: GitHub repositories to scan and the token environment variable.

fields.label: Repositories
fields.helpText: One OWNER/REPO slug per line. The worker fetches all open PRs from each repository.

fields.label: GitHub API base URL
fields.helpText: Leave as-is for github.com. Change to your GitHub Enterprise API URL if needed.

fields.label: Token env var name
fields.helpText: Name of the environment variable holding your GitHub token (not the token itself). Add GITHUB_TOKEN=... to your .env file.

fields.label: Context notes
fields.placeholder: Focus on PRs waiting on me. Ignore bot PRs from dependabot.
fields.helpText: Optional instructions added to every LLM prompt run.

fields.label: Publish digest to Item Bus
fields.helpText: Each run publishes one dev.pr-review-digest item to the queue.

routes.label: PRs
routes.description: Open pull requests with review status, CI, and merge conflicts.
